messages.text: Grasping vines burst from the earth and coil around your legs, rooting you helplessly in place.
Grasping vines erupt and coil around {name}, rooting them fast in place.
The grasping vines wither and release your legs.
The vines rooting {name} wither and fall away.
{name} is rooted in place by a snarl of grasping vines.
